scores.correctness_notes: Agent covers CertificateAvailableEvent and renewal scenarios correctly, but misses CertificateDeniedEvent (mentioned in gold standard) and the interface contract details (CSR requirements, revocation handling, request_errors with specific error codes 101/102/103/201). The renewal/expiry automation details are plausible for v4 but diverge from the gold standard's focus.
scores.hallucination_notes: Agent describes v4 of the old-style library (charms.tls_certificates_interface.v4) rather than charmlibs v1 — different library entirely. Specific details like renewal_relative_time=0.9 default, regenerate_private_key(), renew_certificate() methods, and secret_expired-based renewal mechanism may not accurately reflect the actual v4 API or may not match the current charmlibs library. Minor inaccuracies rather than outright fabrications.
